title: Climbing a Tree 爬树
scene: Jake和Ethan在公园里比赛爬树，看谁爬得高。

lines.en: Ethan, look at that big tree. I bet I can climb it!
lines.zh: Ethan，看那棵大树。我打赌我能爬上去！

lines.en: Are you sure? It looks pretty high.
lines.zh: 你确定吗？看起来好高啊。

lines.en: Watch me. I will grab that branch first.
lines.zh: 看我的。我先抓那根树枝。

lines.en: Be careful! Put your foot on that knot.
Good idea. I am going up!
Wow, you are really high now. Can you see far?
lines.zh: 哇，你现在很高了。能看远吗？

lines.en: Yes! I can see the playground from here!
lines.zh: 能！我能从这里看到操场！

lines.en: That is so cool. I want to try too!
OK, come up slowly. Use the lower branches.
lines.zh: 好的，慢慢上来。用下面的树枝。

lines.en: This is fun! We are like monkeys!
lines.zh: 真好玩！我们像猴子一样！
